_doc: Curated list of GitHub Actions versions that have been sunset, deprecated, or carry known migration risk. Each entry maps an action's `<owner>/<repo>` to a list of sunset_records. The detector flags `uses: <action>@<version>` references where `version` matches an entry's `sunset_versions` (exact-match against the leading-`v` major or full tag). Update by appending; never remove past entries (future scans of historical workflows still benefit).

actions/upload-artifact.reason: v3 sunset 2024-11-30; v4 changed archive/concurrency semantics — workflows on v3 fail outright

actions/download-artifact.reason: v3 sunset alongside upload-artifact@v3; v4 required for compatibility

actions/checkout.reason: v2 used Node 16 (EOL); GitHub announced workflow runner enforcement

actions/setup-node.reason: v1/v2 used deprecated Node runtimes; v3+ required

actions/cache.reason: v1/v2 cache implementation deprecated; v3+ required

actions/setup-java.reason: v1/v2 used Node 12/16 runtimes; v3+ required

tj-actions/changed-files.reason: Repository compromised 2025-03-14; v45.0.7 and prior in v45.x affected — pin to v46+ or use a fork. Operators who used a tag pin (not SHA) ran malicious code

reviewdog/action-misspell.reason: Repository transferred; older versions reference upstream deprecation
